arts.ttl: Napoli target Karim Adeyemi and Mathys Tel as Khvicha Kvaratskhelia replacement
arts.sum: According to Patrick Berger, Napoli are targeting Borussia Dortmund’s Karim Adeyemi and Bayern Munich’s Mathys Tel as possible replacements for PSG-bound Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. During the summer, Adeyemi had been linked…

arts.ttl: Bayern win race to sign Tom Bischof
arts.sum: Bayern München have reportedly won the race to sign Tom Bischof on a free transfer from TSG Hoffenheim.
